name: subsonic-mcp
description: MCP server for Subsonic/OpenSubsonic API. Exposes music library browsing, playback, playlist management, and search.
safety: Read-only by default; playlist creation/deletion requires explicit user confirmation.
Credentials must be in env vars, never in prompts or code.
Never delete library entries or rescan library without confirmation.
notes: Compatible with Navidrome, Airsonic, Funkwhale, and any OpenSubsonic-compliant server. Replace placeholder values before use.
